# Jraft Creative

> Full-service marketing agency in Singapore specialising in website development, SEO, paid performance marketing, and social media content creation.

## Company Overview

Jraft Creative Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore-based full-service digital marketing agency. We serve small and medium businesses across Singapore with end-to-end marketing solutions — from website design and development to search engine optimisation, Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, and social media content creation. All services are handled in-house by one team with no outsourcing or subcontracting.

- Founded: 2025
- Location: 60 Paya Lebar Road, Paya Lebar Square, Singapore 409051
- Website: https://jraftcreative.com
- Email: contact@jraftcreative.com
- Phone: +65 8223 4578

## Services

### Website Development
Custom-designed business websites, ecommerce stores, web applications, and landing pages. Built with modern frameworks, mobile-first responsive design, and performance-optimised code. Pricing starts from SGD 2,500.

### SEO & Performance Optimisation
Technical SEO audits, on-page optimisation, local SEO with Google Business Profile, link building, Core Web Vitals tuning, and monthly performance reporting. Plans from SGD 800/month.

### Paid Performance Marketing
Google Ads (Search & Display), Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram), TikTok Ads, YouTube Ads, retargeting, and conversion tracking. Management from SGD 1,000/month, separate from ad spend.

### Social Media Content Creation
Content strategy, branded graphics, Instagram Reels, TikTok videos, YouTube Shorts, captions, hashtag strategy, and community management. Packages from SGD 2,000/month.

## Industries We Serve

- Music & Creative (music schools, studios, performers, creative agencies)
- F&B & Hospitality (restaurants, cafes, catering, food delivery)
- Retail & Ecommerce (fashion, lifestyle, specialty goods, DTC brands)
- Education (tuition centres, enrichment schools, preschools, edtech)
- Beauty & Aesthetics (salons, spas, aesthetics clinics)
- Healthcare & Wellness (clinics, physiotherapy, TCM, veterinary)
- Professional Services (law firms, accounting firms, insurance agents, property agents)
- Home & Trade (construction, interior design, cleaning services)
- Fitness (gyms, yoga studios, pilates studios)

## Key Differentiators

1. Genuinely full-service: web design, SEO, paid ads, and social media all handled by one in-house team
2. Transparent pricing with no lock-in contracts
3. Average website turnaround of 2 weeks
4. Singapore-focused with deep local market knowledge
5. Industry-specific landing pages and strategies for 9+ verticals

- Full name: Jraft Creative
- Website: https://jraftcreative.com
- Description: Full-service marketing agency in Singapore
